description: Full MCMC diagnostic report from a saved PyMC/ArviZ InferenceData .nc file: trace, rank, autocorrelation, energy, and ESS-evolution plots plus a summary-statistics CSV.
rules: read-only on the input — never mutates it or any remote/live service
input is a netCDF InferenceData file written by idata.to_netcdf(...)
plots + summary CSV are written under record_store/diagnostics/
requires arviz + matplotlib (+ pymc) importable for real output; absent libs produce a graceful {} stub
matplotlib runs headless (Agg backend) — no window is opened
a JSON manifest of the produced artifacts is written to record_store as report.json
usage: Set IDATA (path to a .nc InferenceData file). Optional VAR_NAMES (comma-separated). Outputs: report.json (manifest) + record_store/diagnostics/ (plots + summary_statistics.csv).
limitation: Read-only report. Needs arviz/matplotlib/pymc + the netCDF backend to render plots; offline it writes an empty JSON stub and no plots.
